## New SDARPP Development Site

Submitting this issue will trigger the full intelligence pipeline:
1. **DIBA** — Development Intelligence Briefing (8 sections)
2. **Site Investigator** — Planning constraints, First Nations, infrastructure
3. **Design PoC** — 4 scenarios: AS IS / Potential / Max Value / Special Use

Fill in the JSON block below:

```json
{
  "project_id": "VIC-HUB-SUBURB-2026",
  "project_name": "Street/Area, Suburb STATE",
  "address": "123 Street Name, Suburb VIC 0000",
  "state": "VIC",
  "lga": "Council Name",
  "land_area": "0,000 sqm",
  "current_use": "Describe current use of the site",
  "zoning": "Zone code and name (e.g. Commercial Zone 1 — C1Z)",
  "proposed_use": "Mixed-Use Healthcare Hub — CSSD, Allied Health, SDA (HPS), VMO suites",
  "site_description": "Describe the site: location, proximity to hospital/health services, main road access, surrounding uses, any known constraints or opportunities.",
  "additional_context": "Any investment thesis, partnership discussions, or special context the agents should know."
}
```

---

## Expected Outputs (auto-generated to wiki/)

- [ ] Development Intelligence Briefing (DIBA)
- [ ] Site Investigation Report (planning rules, overlays, First Nations, infrastructure)
- [ ] Design Proof of Concept — 4 scenarios with financial analysis
- [ ] CEO Strategic Commentary
- [ ] Project folder structure (wiki, decisions, risks, budget, schedule, stakeholders)

**Estimated completion: 15-20 minutes**

---

**SDARPP Philosophy Check:**
- [ ] Mixed-Use Healthcare Hub model (4+ revenue streams)
- [ ] Not a pure SDA-only project
- [ ] Target DSCR 1.25-1.30x
- [ ] Target IRR 14-16%
